mapper.sql: d.eucr_id, d.crdt_no, d.batch_no, d.mthdlgy_id, d.vntg_yr, d.use_bgng_dt, d.use_end_dt, d.frst_reg_dt, d.frst_reg_user_id, d.last_chg_dt, d.last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM er.tn_eucr_crdt_dtl d WHERE d.eucr_id = #{eucrId} AND NOW() BETWEEN d.use_bgng_dt AND d.use_end_dt ORDER BY d.batch_no, d.crdt_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_eucr_crdt_dtl (eucr_id, crdt_no, batch_no, mthdlgy_id, vntg_yr, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{eucrId}, #{crdtNo}, #{batchNo}, #{mthdlgyId}, #{vntgYr}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})

choose.when: SELECT NULL::varchar AS crdt_no, NULL::varchar AS eucr_id, NULL::varchar AS batch_no, NULL::varchar AS oprtr_id, NULL::varchar AS oprtr_nm, NULL::char AS rprt_yr WHERE 1 = 0
